visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt stands on a balcony at night, holding a phone to his ear while his hand rests on his hip; a man in a dark suit stands nearby, facing him. The camera then cuts to the interior of a car where a man in a suit sits in the back seat, also holding a phone to his ear, while another man sits in the front passenger seat.
audio_description: A phone conversation is audible, with the man's voice speaking into the device and faint ambient sounds in the background.
